name: player_build_mission_save_data
description: Player::BuildMissionSaveData fills the mission-save payload from local player state, selected weapon controllers, camera state, and timed-hit runtime state.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?BuildMissionSaveData@Player@@YIXPAUPlayerMissionSaveData@@@Z at 0x41f010 currently fails with 361 unmasked mismatches, 32 relocation bytes masked, and 2 VC NOP bytes trimmed; Binary Ninja body is 444 bytes and the VC object symbol is 448 bytes.

The reviewed drift is code shape and store order: the original body walks each weapon bank's two contiguous controller records directly, while the current source uses a temporary two-pointer controller array; later scalar stores and camera getter argument setup are functionally equivalent but not byte-identical. The native smoke verifies the mission-save size, weapon bank records, selected weapon indices, player state scalars, modal master type, camera target/position fields, and timed-hit relative-time conversion.
